raw_text: Hi, do you have interpreter services available for a Mandarin-speaking relative attending an outpatient clinic next month? How do I arrange one?

classification.reasoning: This is a straightforward administrative enquiry about hospital services (interpreter availability) with no safety concerns or complaints; it's informational in nature with advance planning time.

actions.detail: Reply drafted — enquiry is NOT covered by the knowledge base, so the draft promises a handoff instead of guessing.
actions.artifact:
Thank you for getting in touch! Interpreter services aren't something we have details on in our general information resources, so we'll pass your question through to our information desk — someone will be in touch shortly with the right guidance.

What we can share is that for outpatient clinic appointments generally, our Outpatients office is a great first point of contact and may also be able to help with your interpreter query. You can reach them on **(03) 5550 0000**, weekdays **8:30am – 5:00pm**.

actions.detail: Enquiry not answerable from KB — routed to Front-of-House / Info Desk for a human response, with a follow-up flag set. Case left open.
actions.artifact:
[ROUTING NOTICE → Front-of-House / Info Desk]
